mapper.sql: SELECT '1' AS PZBH, '1' AS FLBH, T.HKPCH AS HKPCH, NULL AS ZH, T.DWDM AS DEPT_ID, LEFT (T.HKPCH, 4) AS KJN, CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS KJQJ, 'JZ->记账' AS PZLX, CONCAT( SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 7, 2), 2, '0') ) AS PZRQ, '财' AS KJTX, CASE WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '1' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费' ) WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '2' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', '（补结算）' ) ELSE NULL END AS ZY, '10202->集中户' AS KJKMM, SUM(T.SDGHJE) AS JFJE, NULL AS DFJE, '4' AS FJZS, NULL AS YSDH, NULL AS ZT, '彭雪皎' AS ZDR, NULL AS SHR, NULL AS JZR, NULL AS ZFCBWZ, NULL AS ZBTX, NULL AS YSLY, NULL AS WLDW, NULL AS BM, NULL AS RY, NULL AS BMYSJJFL, NULL AS ZFGNFL, NULL AS ZCLX, NULL AS JFLY, '02->非专项资金' AS ZJXZ, NULL AS ZFYSJJFL, NULL AS MXKM, NULL AS ZFFS, NULL AS XM, NULL AS JSFS, '0000->甘肃省总工会' AS XJGH, NULL AS XMHD, NULL AS GGJCSS, NULL AS JFSL, NULL AS DFSL, NULL AS DJ FROM HYJFCX T

SELECT '1' AS PZBH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () + 1 AS FLBH, T.HKPCH AS HKPCH, T.SDGHZH AS ZH, T.DWDM AS DEPT_ID, LEFT (T.HKPCH, 4) AS KJN, CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS KJQJ, 'JZ->记账' AS PZLX, CONCAT( SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 7, 2), 2, '0') ) AS PZRQ, '财' AS KJTX, CASE WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '1' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', T.NSRMC ) WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '2' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', T.NSRMC, '（补结算）' ) ELSE NULL END AS ZY, '40202->税务代收工会经费' AS KJKMM, NULL AS JFJE, T.SDGHJE AS DFJE, '4' AS FJZS, NULL AS YSDH, NULL AS ZT, '彭雪皎' AS ZDR, NULL AS SHR, NULL AS JZR, NULL AS ZFCBWZ, NULL AS ZBTX, NULL AS YSLY, NULL AS WLDW, NULL AS BM, NULL AS RY, NULL AS BMYSJJFL, NULL AS ZFGNFL, NULL AS ZCLX, NULL AS JFLY, '02->非专项资金' AS ZJXZ, NULL AS ZFYSJJFL, NULL AS MXKM, NULL AS ZFFS, NULL AS XM, NULL AS JSFS, ( SELECT A.DICT_LABEL FROM SYS_DICT_DATA A WHERE A.DICT_VALUE = T.DWDM AND A.DICT_TYPE = 'sys_xjgh' ) AS XJGH, NULL AS XMHD, NULL AS GGJCSS, NULL AS JFSL, NULL AS DFSL, NULL AS DJ FROM HYJFCX T

SELECT '1' AS PZBH, '1' AS FLBH, T.HKPCH AS HKPCH, NULL AS ZH, T.DWDM AS DEPT_ID, LEFT (T.HKPCH, 4) AS KJN, CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS KJQJ, 'JZ->记账' AS PZLX, CONCAT( SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 7, 2), 2, '0') ) AS PZRQ, '财' AS KJTX, CASE WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '1' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成' ) WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '2' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', '（补结算）' ) ELSE NULL END AS ZY, '10201->银行存款/交通银行兰州分行第一支行' AS KJKMM, SUM(T.HYGHJE) AS JFJE, NULL AS DFJE, '4' AS FJZS, NULL AS YSDH, NULL AS ZT, '彭雪皎' AS ZDR, NULL AS SHR, NULL AS JZR, NULL AS ZFCBWZ, NULL AS ZBTX, NULL AS YSLY, NULL AS WLDW, NULL AS BM, NULL AS RY, NULL AS BMYSJJFL, NULL AS ZFGNFL, NULL AS ZCLX, NULL AS JFLY, '02->非专项资金' AS ZJXZ, NULL AS ZFYSJJFL, NULL AS MXKM, NULL AS ZFFS, NULL AS XM, NULL AS JSFS, ( SELECT A.DICT_LABEL FROM SYS_DICT_DATA A WHERE A.DICT_VALUE = T.DWDM AND A.DICT_TYPE = 'sys_xjgh' ) AS XJGH, NULL AS XMHD, NULL AS GGJCSS, NULL AS JFSL, NULL AS DFSL, NULL AS DJ FROM HYJFCX T

SELECT '1' AS PZBH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () + 1 AS FLBH, T.HKPCH AS HKPCH, NULL AS ZH, T.DWDM AS DEPT_ID, LEFT (T.HKPCH, 4) AS KJN, CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS KJQJ, 'JZ->记账' AS PZLX, CONCAT( SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD(SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 7, 2), 2, '0') ) AS PZRQ, '财' AS KJTX, CASE WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '1' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', T.NSRMC ) WHEN RIGHT (T.HKPCH, 1) = '2' THEN CONCAT( '收', SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 1, 4), '年', CAST (SUBSTRING (T.HKPCH, 5, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', T.NSRMC, '（补结算）' ) ELSE NULL END AS ZY, '402->拨缴经费收入' AS KJKMM, NULL AS JFJE, T.HYGHJE AS DFJE, '4' AS FJZS, NULL AS YSDH, NULL AS ZT, '彭雪皎' AS ZDR, NULL AS SHR, NULL AS JZR, NULL AS ZFCBWZ, NULL AS ZBTX, NULL AS YSLY, NULL AS WLDW, NULL AS BM, NULL AS RY, NULL AS BMYSJJFL, NULL AS ZFGNFL, NULL AS ZCLX, NULL AS JFLY, '02->非专项资金' AS ZJXZ, NULL AS ZFYSJJFL, NULL AS MXKM, NULL AS ZFFS, NULL AS XM, NULL AS JSFS, ( SELECT A.DICT_LABEL FROM SYS_DICT_DATA A WHERE A.DICT_VALUE = T.DJXH AND A.DICT_TYPE = 'sys_xjgh' ) AS XJGH, NULL AS XMHD, NULL AS GGJCSS, NULL AS JFSL, NULL AS DFSL, NULL AS DJ FROM HYJFCX T
